DeleteGroupPrompt: Delete the group and all its entries?
DraftEntryAddedChooseIcon: Draft entry added. Choose an icon or image before saving.
EmptyDescription: Add the first entry: choose an .ico, set the menu label, and set the folder name.
EmptyMenuStatus: No menu entries configured. An empty menu is a normal state.
EntryGroupHelp: Leave empty to place the entry in the root menu.
EntryRemovedDraft: Entry removed from the draft. Files and settings change only after save.
ExplorerActionsApplyImmediately: Aksi menu Explorer diterapkan segera dan tidak disimpan bersama pengaturan bahasa.
ExplorerMenuHelpTooltip: Mengontrol submenu Foldora di menu konteks lama Windows File Explorer. Di Windows 11 muncul lewat Show more options.
ExplorerNoEntriesNotCreated: No enabled menu entries. Explorer menu was not created.
GroupRemovedDraft: Group removed from the draft. Settings change only after save.
HelpAboutSummary: Short instructions, install notes, and what Foldora changes on your machine.
HelpDataInstallIcons: Styled folders can reference imported .ico files from the user data folder.
HelpDataInstallUserData: Settings, imported icons, packs, and logs live in %AppData%\Foldora.
HelpLicenseBody: Foldora original code and docs use 0BSD. Third-party assets require explicit compatible licenses.
HelpMenuHostBody: Foldora.MenuHost.exe is not a service, tray app, or background helper. Explorer starts it only when you click a Foldora menu command.
HelpUninstallBody: Use scripts/uninstall-user.ps1 to unregister Explorer integration and remove installed binaries.
HelpUninstallUserDataWarning: User data is kept by default. Removing it can break icons of already styled folders.
HelpUseStepChooseIcon: 2. Choose an .ico file or PNG/JPG/BMP image.
HelpUseStepEnableExplorer: 5. Enable the Explorer menu in Settings.
HelpUseStepSetNames: 3. Set the menu label and created folder name.
HelpUseStepUseExplorer: 6. Use the File Explorer context menu to create styled folders.
HelpWhatFoldoraDoesBody: Foldora lets you create styled folders from your own File Explorer menu.
HelpWhereMenuAppearsHKCU: Foldora currently uses a per-user HKCU legacy context menu entry.
HelpWhereMenuAppearsLegacy: On Windows 11, the legacy context menu may appear under Show more options.
IconImageConversionFailed: Could not convert the selected image to an ICO file.
IconDropCouldNotUseFile: Could not use the dropped file as an icon.
IconDropDirectoryRejected: Drop a file, not a folder.
IconDropMultipleFilesRejected: Only one icon file can be dropped at a time.
IconDropTooltip: Drop an ICO, PNG, JPG, or BMP file here to use it as the folder icon.
IconDropUnsupportedFile: The dropped file is not a supported icon or image format.
IconNotSelectedFixFile: Icon was not selected. Fix the file error.
IconSelectedImportedOnSave: Icon selected and will be imported on save.
InstallationPathsHelpTooltip: Path ini menunjukkan dari mana Foldora berjalan, lokasi data pengguna, dan MenuHost yang dipanggil Explorer.
LanguageSavedRestartNotice: Settings saved. Some language changes may apply after restart.
MenuHostServiceNote: MenuHost bukan layanan. MenuHost hanya berjalan saat Explorer memanggil perintah menu Foldora.
NoEnabledEntriesDetail: No enabled menu entries. Menu will not be created.
OpenLocationTooltip: Membuka folder yang berisi file ini.
PageSubtitle: Create and configure File Explorer context menu entries.
PreviewChangesTooltip: Menampilkan entri registry HKCU milik Foldora yang akan dibuat atau diperbarui. Tidak ada yang ditulis.
ResetConfirm: I understand that the entry list will be cleared
ResetDescription: Reset clears the menu entries and disables Explorer integration.
ResetIconNote: Imported .ico files are not deleted yet.
SaveOrDiscardBeforeExplorer: Simpan atau buang perubahan menu sebelum mengubah integrasi Explorer.
SettingsLanguageRestartNote: Some language changes may apply after restart.
SettingsNotSavedFixErrors: Settings were not saved. Fix the errors.
SettingsSavedExplorerNotUpdated: Settings saved, but Explorer menu was not updated.
SettingsSavedNoEntriesExplorerDisabled: Settings saved. No enabled entries, Explorer menu disabled.
UninstallHint: Gunakan skrip uninstall untuk menghapus file terpasang. Data pengguna tetap disimpan secara default.
Validation.display_name_too_long: Menu label must be {maxLength} characters or shorter. Current length: {actualLength}.
Validation.entry_icon_path_empty: Pilih .ico untuk item menu sebelum menyimpan.
Validation.entry_id_empty: Menu entry id must not be empty.
Validation.folder_name_control_chars: Created folder name contains control character {characterCode}.
Validation.folder_name_invalid_chars: Nama folder yang dibuat berisi karakter tidak valid "{character}".
Validation.folder_name_reserved: Created folder name uses a reserved Windows device name: {reservedName}.
Validation.folder_name_too_long: Created folder name must be {maxLength} characters or shorter. Current length: {actualLength}.
Validation.folder_name_trailing_dot_or_s: Created folder name must not end with a dot or a space.
Validation.group_name_nested_not_support: Nested groups are not supported yet. Remove "{separator}" from the group name.
Validation.group_name_too_long: Group name must be {maxLength} characters or shorter. Current length: {actualLength}.
Validation.icon_directory_out_of_bounds: Icon directory entries do not fit inside the file.
Validation.icon_empty: Icon file must not be empty: {filePath}.
Validation.icon_extension: Foldora supports only .ico files. Current extension: {extension}.
Validation.icon_header_invalid: Icon file has an invalid ICO header.
Validation.icon_header_too_small: Icon file is too small for an ICO header.
Validation.icon_image_count_invalid: Icon file has an invalid image count: {count}.
Validation.icon_image_data_out_of_bounds: Icon image data extends past the end of the file.
Validation.icon_image_empty: Icon image data size must not be zero.
Validation.icon_image_offset_invalid: Icon image data offset is outside the file.
Validation.icon_path_empty: Icon path must not be empty.
Validation.icon_read_failed: Icon file could not be read: {error}.
Validation.icon_too_large: Icon file must be 10 MB or smaller. Current size: {actualBytes} bytes.
Validation.menu_enabled_entries_limit: Menu can contain at most {limit} enabled entries. Current count: {count}.
Validation.menu_group_children_limit: Group "{groupName}" can contain at most {limit} enabled entries. Current count: {count}.
Validation.menu_group_limit: Menu can contain at most {limit} groups. Current count: {count}.
Validation.menu_total_entries_limit: Menu can contain at most {limit} entries. Current count: {count}.
